001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.isEmpty;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isEmpty;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.time.temporal.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.Map.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
034
035/**
036 * Session for parsing TOML into POJOs.
037 */
038/*
039 * Suppression rationale:
040 * - rawtypes, unchecked: TOML maps use Map<String,Object> with dynamic values requiring casts.
041 * - java:S3776: Cognitive complexity; parser logic is inherently branched for TOML syntax.
042 * - java:S6541: Brain method; parser orchestration spans many concerns.
043 * - java:S135: Multiple break/continue per loop needed for TOML state-machine parsing.
044 * - java:S115: ARG_ctx follows project assertion-param naming convention (ARG_<param>).
045 */
046@SuppressWarnings({
047   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic Map/List handling
048   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in convertValue
049   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parseMessage
050   "java:S6541", // Brain method acceptable for parseMessage
051   "java:S135", // Multiple breaks acceptable in parse loop
052   "java:S115", // ARG_ prefix follows framework convention
053   "java:S1612", // Class.isAssignableFrom necessary when checking target type (Class<?>), not object instance
054   "resource"   // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
055})
056public class TomlParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements RecordReadable {
057
058   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
059
060   private static final String MSG_INVALID_NUMBER = "Invalid number: ";
061
062   /**
063    * Builder for TOML parser session.
064    */
065   public static class Builder extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
066
067      private TomlParser ctx;
068
069      protected Builder(TomlParser ctx) {
070         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
071         this.ctx = ctx;
072      }
073
074      @Override
075      public TomlParserSession build() {
076         return new TomlParserSession(this);
077      }
078   }
079
080   /**
081    * Creates a session builder.
082    *
083    * @param ctx The parser context.
084    * @return The builder.
085    */
086   public static Builder create(TomlParser ctx) {
087      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
088   }
089
090   private final TomlParser ctx;
091
092   protected TomlParserSession(Builder builder) {
093      super(builder);
094      ctx = builder.ctx;
095   }
096
097   @Override /* RecordReadable */
098   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
099      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
100   }
101
102   @Override /* RecordReadable */
103   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
104      return false;
105   }
106
107   @Override
108   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
109      try (Reader r = pipe.getParserReader()) {
110         if (r == null)
111            return null;
112         Map<String, Object> root = parseTomlDocument(new TomlTokenizer(r));
113         if (isEmpty(root))
114            return type.canCreateNewBean(getOuter()) ? type.newInstance(getOuter()) : null;
115         // Root _value wrapper: document has exactly one key _value
116         if (root.size() == 1 && root.containsKey("_value")) {
117            Object inner = root.get("_value");
118            return (T) convertValue(inner, type);
119         }
120         return convertMapToType(root, type);
121      }
122   }
123
124   private Map<String, Object> parseTomlDocument(TomlTokenizer t) throws IOException, ParseException {
125      Map<String, Object> root = new LinkedHashMap<>();
126      Map<String, Object> currentTable = root;
127
128      while (!t.isEof()) {
129         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
130         if (t.isEof())
131            break;
132
133         int c = t.peek();
134         if (c == '[') {
135            t.read();
136            if (t.peek() == '[') {
137               t.read();
138               String path = parseTablePath(t);
139               Object existing = getOrCreateAt(root, path);
140               if (!(existing instanceof List)) {
141                  if (existing != null)
142                     throw t.parseException("Key " + path + " redefined");
143                  setAt(root, path, new ArrayList<>());
144                  existing = getOrCreateAt(root, path);
145               }
146               Map<String, Object> newTable = new LinkedHashMap<>();
147               ((List)existing).add(newTable);
148               currentTable = newTable;
149            } else {
150               String path = parseTablePath(t);
151               currentTable = getOrCreateTableAt(root, path);
152            }
153         } else if (c == '=' || Character.isLetterOrDigit(c) || c == '"' || c == '\'' || c == '_' || c == '-') {
154            List<String> keyPath = parseKey(t);
155            if (keyPath.isEmpty())
156               throw t.parseException("Expected key");
157            t.skipWhitespace();
158            if (t.read() != '=')
159               throw t.parseException("Expected '='");
160            t.skipWhitespace();
161            Object value = parseValue(t);
162            setValueAt(currentTable, keyPath, value);
163         } else {
164            break;
165         }
166      }
167      return root;
168   }
169
170   private static String parseTablePath(TomlTokenizer t) throws IOException, ParseException {
171      t.skipWhitespace();
172      var parts = new ArrayList<String>();
173      while (true) {
174         String key = t.readBareKey();
175         if (key == null)
176            break;
177         parts.add(key);
178         t.skipWhitespace();
179         if (t.peek() != '.')
180            break;
181         t.read();
182         t.skipWhitespace();
183      }
184      if (t.peek() == ']')
185         t.read();
186      if (t.peek() == ']')
187         t.read();
188      return String.join(".", parts);
189   }
190
191   private static List<String> parseKey(TomlTokenizer t) throws IOException, ParseException {
192      var parts = new ArrayList<String>();
193      while (true) {
194         String key = t.readBareKey();
195         if (key == null)
196            break;
197         parts.add(key);
198         t.skipWhitespace();
199         if (t.peek() != '.')
200            break;
201         t.read();
202         t.skipWhitespace();
203      }
204      return parts;
205   }
206
207   private Object parseValue(TomlTokenizer t) throws IOException, ParseException {
208      int c = t.peek();
209      if (c == '"') {
210         if (isTripleQuote(t, '"'))
211            return t.readMultiLineBasicString();
212         return t.readBasicString();
213      }
214      if (c == '\'') {
215         if (isTripleQuote(t, '\''))
216            return t.readMultiLineLiteralString();
217         return t.readLiteralString();
218      }
219      if (c == 't' || c == 'f')
220         return t.readBoolean();
221      if (c == '[') {
222         t.read();
223         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
224         var list = new ArrayList<>();
225         while (t.peek() != ']') {
226            list.add(parseValue(t));
227            t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
228            if (t.peek() == ',') {
229               t.read();
230               t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
231            }
232         }
233         t.read();
234         return list;
235      }
236      if (c == '{') {
237         t.read();
238         t.skipWhitespace();
239         var map = new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();
240         while (t.peek() != '}') {
241            t.skipWhitespace();
242            List<String> k = parseKey(t);
243            if (k.isEmpty())
244               throw t.parseException("Expected key in inline table");
245            t.skipWhitespace();
246            if (t.read() != '=')
247               throw t.parseException("Expected '='");
248            t.skipWhitespace();
249            Object v = parseValue(t);
250            map.put(k.get(0), v);
251            t.skipWhitespace();
252            if (t.peek() == ',') {
253               t.read();
254               t.skipWhitespace();
255            }
256         }
257         t.read();
258         return map;
259      }
260      if (Character.isDigit(c) || c == '+' || c == '-') {
261         String s = readUntilValueEnd(t);
262         if (isEmpty(s))
263            throw t.parseException("Expected value");
264         Number special = parseSpecialFloat(s);
265         if (special != null)
266            return special;
267         Number radix = parseRadixInteger(s, t);
268         if (radix != null)
269            return radix;
270         String noUnderscore = s.replace("_", "");
271         if (s.length() >= 10 && s.charAt(4) == '-' && (s.contains("T") || s.contains(":") || s.contains(" ")))
272            return TomlTokenizer.parseDateTimeString(s);
273         // Date-like patterns kept as string for convertValue to parse as LocalDate, YearMonth, Year
274         if (isDateLikeString(noUnderscore))
275            return s;
276         if (s.contains(".") || s.toLowerCase().contains("e"))
277            return Double.parseDouble(noUnderscore);
278         try {
279            return Long.parseLong(noUnderscore);
280         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
281            // May be date/time string that slipped through (e.g. LocalDate, LocalTime)
282            if (s.contains("-") || s.contains(":"))
283               return s;
284            throw t.parseException(MSG_INVALID_NUMBER + s);
285         }
286      }
287      if (c == 'i' || c == 'n') {
288         String s = readUntilValueEnd(t);
289         Number special = parseSpecialFloat(s);
290         if (special != null)
291            return special;
292         throw t.parseException("Expected inf or nan");
293      }
294      throw t.parseException("Unexpected character: " + (char)c);
295   }
296
297   private static boolean isTripleQuote(TomlTokenizer t, char q) throws IOException {
298      if (t.peek() != q) return false;
299      int c1 = t.read();
300      int c2 = t.read();
301      int c3 = t.peek();
302      if (c2 == q && c3 == q) {
303         t.read();
304         return true;
305      }
306      if (c2 >= 0)
307         t.unread(c2);
308      t.unread(c1);
309      return false;
310   }
311
312   private static boolean isDateLikeString(String s) {
313      if (s == null || s.length() < 7)
314         return false;
315      // yyyy-MM-dd (LocalDate) | yyyy-MM (YearMonth) - exclude plain 4-digit (e.g. port numbers)
316      return (s.length() == 10 && s.charAt(4) == '-' && s.charAt(7) == '-')
317         || (s.length() == 7 && s.charAt(4) == '-');
318   }
319
320   private static String readUntilValueEnd(TomlTokenizer t) throws IOException {
321      var sb = new StringBuilder();
322      int c;
323      while ((c = t.peek()) >= 0 && c != ' ' && c != '\t' && c != '\n' && c != '\r' && c != '#' && c != ',' && c != ']' && c != '}') {
324         sb.append((char) t.read());
325      }
326      return sb.isEmpty() ? null : sb.toString().trim();
327   }
328
329   private static Number parseSpecialFloat(String s) {
330      if (s == null)
331         return null;
332      if (s.equals("inf") || s.equals("+inf"))
333         return Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
334      if (s.equals("-inf"))
335         return Double.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;
336      if (s.equals("nan") || s.equals("+nan") || s.equals("-nan"))
337         return Double.NaN;
338      return null;
339   }
340
341   private static Number parseRadixInteger(String s, TomlTokenizer t) throws ParseException {
342      if (s == null || s.length() < 3 || s.charAt(0) != '0')
343         return null;
344      char p = s.charAt(1);
345      int radix;
346      if (p == 'x' || p == 'X')
347         radix = 16;
348      else if (p == 'o' || p == 'O')
349         radix = 8;
350      else if (p == 'b' || p == 'B')
351         radix = 2;
352      else
353         return null;
354      String digits = s.substring(2).replace("_", "");
355      if (digits.isEmpty())
356         throw t.parseException(MSG_INVALID_NUMBER + s);
357      try {
358         return Long.parseUnsignedLong(digits, radix);
359      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
360         throw t.parseException(MSG_INVALID_NUMBER + s);
361      }
362   }
363
364   private static Object getOrCreateAt(Map<String, Object> root, String path) {
365      String[] parts = path.split("\\.");
366      Object current = root;
367      for (int i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
368         current = ((Map)current).computeIfAbsent(parts[i], k -> new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>());
369      }
370      return ((Map)current).get(parts[parts.length - 1]);
371   }
372
373   private static Map<String, Object> getOrCreateTableAt(Map<String, Object> root, String path) {
374      String[] parts = path.split("\\.");
375      Object current = root;
376      for (String part : parts) {
377         current = ((Map)current).computeIfAbsent(part, k -> new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>());
378      }
379      return (Map<String, Object>) current;
380   }
381
382   private static void setAt(Map<String, Object> root, String path, Object value) {
383      String[] parts = path.split("\\.");
384      Object current = root;
385      for (int i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
386         current = ((Map)current).computeIfAbsent(parts[i], k -> new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>());
387      }
388      ((Map)current).put(parts[parts.length - 1], value);
389   }
390
391   private static void setValueAt(Map<String, Object> root, List<String> keyPath, Object value) {
392      if (keyPath.size() == 1) {
393         root.put(keyPath.get(0), value);
394         return;
395      }
396      Object current = root;
397      for (int i = 0; i < keyPath.size() - 1; i++) {
398         current = ((Map)current).computeIfAbsent(keyPath.get(i), k -> new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>());
399      }
400      ((Map)current).put(keyPath.get(keyPath.size() - 1), value);
401   }
402
403   private <T> T convertMapToType(Map<String, Object> map, ClassMeta<T> type) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
404      if (type.isMap()) {
405         var keyType = type.getKeyType();
406         var valueType = type.getValueType();
407         Map m = type.canCreateNewInstance(getOuter()) ? (Map) type.newInstance(getOuter()) : newGenericMap(type);
408         for (var e : map.entrySet()) {
409            String keyStr = "null".equals(e.getKey()) ? null : e.getKey();
410            Object key = convertAttrToType(m, keyStr, keyType);
411            Object val = convertValue(e.getValue(), valueType);
412            m.put(key, val);
413         }
414         return (T) m;
415      }
416      BeanMap<?> bm = toBeanMap(type.newInstance(getOuter()));
417      populateBeanMap(bm, map);
418      return (T) bm.getBean();
419   }
420
421   private JsonMap toJsonMap(Map<?, ?> map) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
422      var jm = new JsonMap();
423      for (Entry<?, ?> e : map.entrySet()) {
424         Object k = e.getKey();
425         Object v = e.getValue();
426         Object converted = v instanceof Map m ? toJsonMap(m) : convertValue(v, object());
427         jm.put(k == null ? "null" : k.toString(), converted);
428      }
429      return jm;
430   }
431
432   private void populateBeanMap(BeanMap<?> bm, Map<String, Object> map) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
433      for (Entry<String, Object> e : map.entrySet()) {
434         String key = e.getKey();
435         Object val = e.getValue();
436         BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = bm.getMeta().getProperties().get(key);
437         if (pMeta == null && isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties())
438            continue;
439         if (pMeta == null)
440            throw new ParseException(this, "Unknown property ''{0}''", key);
441         ClassMeta<?> targetType = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
442         Object converted = convertValue(val, targetType);
443         bm.put(key, converted);
444      }
445   }
446
447   private Object convertValue(Object val, ClassMeta<?> targetType) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
448      if (val == null)
449         return null;
450      String nv = ctx != null ? ctx.getNullValue() : null;
451      if (val instanceof String s && nv != null && s.equals(nv))
452         return null;
453      if (val instanceof Map map) {
454         if (JsonMap.class.isAssignableFrom(targetType.inner()))
455            return toJsonMap(map);
456         if (targetType.isBean()) {
457            BeanMap<?> child = toBeanMap(targetType.newInstance(getOuter()));
458            populateBeanMap(child, map);
459            return child.getBean();
460         }
461      }
462      if (val instanceof List list && targetType.isCollectionOrArray()) {
463         ClassMeta<?> elType = targetType.getElementType();
464         List result = new ArrayList();
465         for (Object item : list) {
466            result.add(convertValue(item, elType));
467         }
468         return targetType.isArray() ? toArray(targetType, result) : result;
469      }
470      // Bare numeric wire literals (e.g. "2024", "8100000000000") arrive here as Number values
471      // from the TOML tokenizer.  Route them through the format-aware parsers so the configured
472      // MarshallingContext.get<Format>() hint (NANOS, ISO_YEAR, MILLIS, …) reaches the coercion.
473      // Without this routing the generic Number → T coercion below would silently drop the hint
474      // (e.g. treating Long(2024) as epoch-millis → 1970-01-01T00:00:02.024Z instead of year 2024).
475      if (val instanceof Number num) {
476         if (targetType.isNumber())
477            return convertToMemberType(null, num, targetType);
478         if (targetType.isDuration())
479            return parseDuration(num.toString());
480         if (targetType.isPeriod())
481            return parsePeriod(num.toString());
482         if (targetType.isDate())
483            return parseDate(num.toString(), targetType);
484         if (targetType.isCalendar())
485            return parseCalendar(num.toString(), targetType);
486         if (targetType.isTemporal())
487            return parseTemporal(num.toString(), targetType);
488      }
489      if (val instanceof String string) {
490         if (targetType.isDate())
491            return parseDate(string, targetType);
492         if (targetType.isCalendar())
493            return parseCalendar(string, targetType);
494         if (targetType.isTemporal())
495            return parseTemporal(string, targetType);
496         if (targetType.isDuration())
497            return parseDuration(string);
498         if (targetType.isPeriod())
499            return parsePeriod(string);
500      }
501      // Native TOML datetime literals (Z-zoned / offset / local) are returned by TomlTokenizer as
502      // java.time.OffsetDateTime / LocalDateTime / LocalDate / LocalTime objects.  Re-stringify
503      // through the temporal's own ISO toString() and route through parseTemporal so the
504      // configured TemporalFormat hint (e.g. ISO_INSTANT) is honored — otherwise the generic
505      // Temporal → T coercion below applies the local zone and we lose the wire's UTC anchor.
506      if (val instanceof TemporalAccessor ta && targetType.isTemporal())
507         return parseTemporal(ta.toString(), targetType);
508      // Bug #12: route String-shaped byte[] values (collection-element + top-level dispatch sites)
509      // through the configured BinaryFormat's variant binarySwap before falling through to the
510      // default String → byte[] coercion.  The bean-property path is unaffected because the
511      // per-property MPP install hides the type-level default swap behind the per-property swap.
512      var binBytes = tryUnswapByteArray(val, targetType);
513      if (binBytes != null)
514         return binBytes;
515      return convertToMemberType(null, val, targetType);
516   }
517
518   /**
519    * Routes a {@link String}-shaped {@code byte[]} value through the session-aware
520    * {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps.BinarySwap} when one is matched.
521    *
522    * <p>Collection-element and top-level dispatch sites don't go through
523    * {@code MarshalledPropertyPostProcessor}'s per-property swap install, so they fall back to the
524    * {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.DefaultSwaps} registry.  Returns {@code null} when the target isn't
525    * {@code byte[]}, the value isn't a {@link String}, or no swap is matched on the current session
526    * (e.g. {@link BinaryFormat#NOT_SET} is configured).
527    */
528   @SuppressWarnings({
529      "java:S1168" // Null is a meaningful 'no byte[] unswap applies' signal; callers fall through on null (an empty array would wrongly mean 'unswapped to empty bytes').
530   })
531   private byte[] tryUnswapByteArray(Object val, ClassMeta<?> targetType) throws ParseException {
532      if (!(val instanceof String s) || targetType == null || targetType.inner() != byte[].class)
533         return null;
534      var swap = targetType.getSwap(this);
535      if (swap == null)
536         return null;
537      return (byte[]) unswap(swap, s, targetType);
538   }
539}
